name: Pasticcio Di Maccheroni
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------BECHAMEL SAUCE-------------------------------
3 tbsp Butter
3/4 cup Flour
1 cup Milk
Salt and pepper to taste
2 Egg yolks
1. Saute the onion, green onion, celery, and carrot in the butter until tender.
2. Add salt, pepper, ground beef, and water. Cook for a few minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and let simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and stir in lightly beaten egg whites.
5. Boil 4 cups water with salt. Add macaroni and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Drain macaroni and mix with cold water.
7. While cooking macaroni, prepare Bechamel Sauce:
a. Combine butter and flour in saucepan. Stir until smooth.
b. Gradually add milk, whisking constantly.
c. Cook over low heat until thickened.
d. Remove from heat, season with salt and pepper (optional nutmeg).
e. Beat egg yolks, stir into hot sauce.
f. Add to remaining sauce and mix well.
8. Place unsalted butter in macaroni.
9. Spread half the macaroni in a baking dish, sprinkle with cheese.
10. Cover with meat mixture.
11. Top with remaining macaroni and cheese.
12. Pour Bechamel Sauce over top.
13. Bake at medium temperature for 40 minutes.
14. Cut into squares when cooled and serve.
